sequence_title: Was Marx Right? – 60-Minute Self-Directed Learning Sequence

timeline.facilitator_actions: Direct learner to begin Activity A1. Materials used: M1 (Key Marxist Concepts Explained), M2 (Worked Example: Analysing a Workplace Scenario), M3 (Sample Output - Model Paragraph), M4 (Self-Check Checklist).
timeline.learner_actions: Read M1 carefully, then study the reasoning process in M2. Review M3 to see how concepts are applied in writing. Complete the task by applying concepts to a new scenario and evaluate work using M4.
timeline.transition_to_next: Once key concepts are understood and applied, move to analysing how these concepts create broader outcomes in capitalism.

timeline.facilitator_actions: Direct learner to continue with Activity A2. Materials used: M5 (Mechanisms of Capitalism), M6 (Worked Analytic Pass: From Mechanism to Outcome), M7 (Analysis Table), M8 (Self-Check Checklist).
timeline.learner_actions: Read M5 to understand mechanisms, then follow the reasoning in M6 step-by-step. Complete M7 by linking mechanisms to outcomes. Write a short causal explanation and verify using M8.
timeline.transition_to_next: Having analysed mechanisms, move to comparing Marx’s predictions with real-world evidence.

timeline.facilitator_actions: Direct learner to complete Activity A3. Materials used: M9 (Case Scenarios), M10 (Comparison Table), M11 (Self-Check Checklist).
timeline.learner_actions: Read both cases in M9. Complete M10 by comparing predictions and outcomes. Write a paragraph evaluating one prediction. Use M11 to validate reasoning.
timeline.transition_to_next: Use your comparisons to prepare for forming an overall judgement about Marx’s accuracy and relevance.

timeline.facilitator_actions: Direct learner to complete Activity A4. Materials used: M12 (Criteria for Evaluating Marx), M13 (Decision Table), M14 (Judgement Template), M15 (Checklist), M16 (Transfer Task), M17 (Consolidation Summary).
timeline.learner_actions: Review evaluation criteria in M12. Complete the decision table M13. Write a structured judgement using M14. Refine using M15. Extend thinking by completing M16. Finish by writing a consolidation summary using M17.
timeline.transition_to_next: Session ends with completed evaluation and synthesis of learning.
